outfits.name: 추출된 의상
outfits.prompt: A high-realism portrait of a young Korean woman with a slender yet curvy hourglass figure, featuring a narrow waist and elegant posture. She is wearing a tight-fitting light gray mock-neck top made of soft, breathable cotton-stretch fabric, detailed with a small black crest embroidery on the left chest. The lower half features a high-waisted black midi pencil skirt with intricate horizontal ruching and pleated textures, hugging the hips and thighs in a sophisticated bodycon fit. The scene is illuminated by natural soft daylight, showcasing ultra-detailed skin textures, fine pores, and realistic fabric fibers. 8k UHD, cinematic lighting, sharp focus on textile details and natural human skin.

The top has a high circular neckline with thick binding and vertical ribbed texture throughout, providing a snug fitted silhouette. The leggings are made from an opaque, matte-finish technical fabric with invisible flat-lock seams and a seamless hem. The ensemble is designed for high-mobility fitness activities, showcasing a minimalist aesthetic with clean lines and no visible hardware or closures, creating a sleek pull-on athletic look.

The upper bodice and long sleeves are crafted from a sheer black mesh fabric, creating a transparent yoke that extends into a high mock neck collar. Below the sweetheart-shaped bust line, the garment transitions into an opaque, matte black stretch fabric. The lower half of the dress showcases intricate lateral ruching and horizontal gathers throughout the skirt, creating a textured and draped effect. The sleeves are extra long, extending slightly over the hands with a lightweight, see-through finish. The silhouette is skin-tight and form-fitting, ending at a mid-thigh mini length with a clean, finished hem. Minimalist silver-tone drop earrings with a shimmering finish are visible as the sole accessory.
